children.text: You're in the fertile window, and can expect to ovulate soon if you have not already. You may feel some pain associated with ovulation known as mittelschmerz, but otherwise should feel relatively normal and should continue having sex.
You're fertile, make sure you don't miss the opportunity.
You're in your fertile window, and accordingly might feel great!

Ovulation will most likely occur soon, if it has not already. Estrogen levels continue to rise. Of the follicles that have developed, one will continue to mature and eventually release an egg. The uterine lining will begin to thicken during this time as well.

Sexual intercourse is strongly recommended! Sex both everyday and every other day have shown similarly successful rates of conception. Be sure to complete an ovulation test and enter the results here.
